---
title: "Landmarks of Recent History, 1770-1883."
---

## Landmarks of Recent History, 1770-1883.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Walter Smith, 34 King Street, Covent Garden, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
